strings.BOG_DEPUTY_BODY_DESCRIPTION: Vigil est daemon celeritatis hyperagressivus quae iustitiam suis gemellis revolveris et ictibus calcis mortiferis dispensat.
strings.BOG_DEPUTY_BODY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..atque ita discessit, ad sonum plausus tonantis.
strings.BOG_DEPUTY_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..atque ita evanuit, spectaculo suo tandem finito.
strings.BOG_DEPUTY_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Vigil in quamlibet directionem currere potest. Hostes artibus suis feriens auget <style=cIsUtility>celeritatem motus</style> cumulabilem.
strings.BOG_DEPUTY_BODY_PRIMARY_SHOOT_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis</style>. Revolveris media distantia iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>150% damno</style>.
strings.BOG_DEPUTY_BODY_SECONDARY_SLING_DESCRIPT: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis</style>. Duas revolveras iace. Quaeque revolvera hostem propinquum pro <style=cIsDamage>6x100% damno</style> petet, deinde pro <style=cIsDamage>300% damno</style> explodet.
strings.BOG_DEPUTY_BODY_UTILITY_SHOOTINGSTAR_DES: <style=cIsDamage>Stupefaciens</style>. Ante salta et hostem infra te iacula pro <style=cIsDamage>4x150% damno</style>.
strings.BOG_DEPUTY_BODY_SPECIAL_SKULLBREAKER_DES: <style=cIsUtility>Gravis</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Impetum fac</style> et ab hoste resili, <style=cIsDamage>800% damnum</style> faciens. <style=cIsUtility>Caedes moram artis utilitatis tuae restituunt</style>.
strings.BOG_DEPUTY_BODY_SPECIAL_BULLETHEAVEN_DES: Alte in aerem salta et glandes deorsum furenter iace, quaeque <style=cIsDamage>150% damnum</style> faciens. Numerus ictuum cum celeritate impetus crescit.
strings.BOG_DEPUTY_BODY_MASTERYUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEV: Ut Vigil, ludum vince aut te oblitera in Monsoon.
